title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: CAMPBELL COMMUNITY CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily. 155 High Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 8:30am-7pm, Tuesday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm (541) 682-5318 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 682-5318 Main phone Main phone (541) 682-5318 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CAMPBELL COMMUNITY CENTER
